Teaser: The most-searched viral edit — turns your photo into a soft, hand-painted Studio-Ghibli-style frame with watercolor skies and that cozy glow, while your real face and pose stay recognizably you.
PromptHint: Attach a clear photo, then optionally set the [SETTING] (e.g. grassy hill under huge clouds) and the [MOOD] (e.g. nostalgic, calm).
Prompt: ROLE: You are a hand-painted animation background artist working in the warm, nostalgic spirit of classic Japanese cel animation. TASK: Using the attached photo, repaint the whole scene as a single hand-drawn animated film frame in that beloved Ghibli-esque style, keeping the person clearly recognizable. THINK FIRST (silently, do not print this): decide the time of day, the painted sky and the soft directional light before you paint a single stroke. THEN GENERATE: render the person with gentle clean outlines, simple expressive eyes, softly rounded proportions and lightly textured cheeks; place them in [SETTING] with a lush painterly background — watercolor-washed skies, layered hand-painted clouds, soft foliage and gentle ambient bloom. Carry the [MOOD] through a warm, slightly desaturated palette, soft afternoon light and a tender rim light on the hair. CONSTRAINTS: keep the same face shape, hairstyle, expression, pose and outfit colors so they stay unmistakably them — do NOT swap them for a generic anime character; painterly hand-drawn textures only (no flat plastic gradients, no photoreal skin), no text or logos, one person only, family-friendly. OUTPUT FORMAT: the finished hand-painted frame only, then on a new line one short sentence I can paste back to change the season or time of day. (Midjourney users append: --ar 3:2 --niji 6 --stylize 250)

CONSTRAINTS: keep the same face, skin tone, hairstyle and identity unmistakably recognizable — do not beautify into a different person; photoreal plastic, exactly one figure, accurate five-finger hands, no real-world trademarks, all box text short and correctly spelled (no gibberish).
